mapper.select: select a.tran_date ,dbo.getCustomerName(a.customer_cd) as customer_name ,a.customer_cd ,a.from_storage_cd ,dbo.getStorageName(a.from_storage_cd) as fromStorageName ,a.to_storage_cd ,dbo.getStorageName(a.to_storage_cd) as toStorageName ,a.remark ,a.manager_id ,a.order_type ,dbo.getUserName(a.manager_id) as manager_name ,a.tran_id ,a.pur_id from tb_pur_mst a where a.tran_id = #{tranId}
select a.item_cd ,a.item_name ,a.spec ,a.qty ,a.lot_No ,a.expiry_date ,a.test_no ,a.etc ,a.pur_item_id ,a.tran_id from tb_inv_tran_item a where a.tran_id = #{tranId}
select tran_id from tb_inv_tran_mst where pur_id = #{purId} and tran_type_cd ='A'
